reviews.review_description: All video players for gear vr are useless, this one is no different
I denied the option of share images and then the oculus doesnt worked. I had to restart the oculus. Beware
Really like this app picture quality is amazing. I like to give 5 stars, BUT Big problem that I have  that there is no option to delete images that you do not like.

developer_response.body: You could manually remove the cached data under the ORBX/Media/ folder

reviews.review_description: Интересно

I cannot find how to play my videos on Oculus Go device. On Gear VR device there was ORBX\Media folder where I put my videos. Oculus Go doesn’t have this folder and ORBX Player cannot see videos from device Movies folder.
Update: After I restarted device this folder showed up.
Please add option to reverse left/right eyes for 360 stereo video. All native players use Top/Bottom fields order, but ORBX player uses Bottom/Top order. I have to create two versions of video files for native players and ORBX player.
I haven't tried it out as when downloading from the browser you can't leave Oculus while it's downloading.. "Ain't nobody got time for that!" Uninstalled. �

When trying to move the huge 3GB worth of content I had thus far downloaded onto my SD card, the ORBX folder refused to budge. Trying to manually move that folder just causes the app to try downloading everything again.

The tag showing that this app can be transferred is misleading. It is incredibly disappointing that such amazing stereo pictures and videos cannot be moved to my dedicated media storage. Will update this review if this issue gets resolved.

This is the future of passive VR content, for sure. I highly recommend checking it out just to see where 3D photos/videos are headed. That said, there is one huge downside, that being how much space the individual photos/videos take up on your device and how long they take to download (a ten second animation is 1GB in size). 

Have you guys heard of middle-out compression? :P
Doesnt work ! Once inside it keeps rotating and says downloading , waste of time
The best (real 3D, 360) VR image and video quality I have ever seen in GearVR. Far better than anything else. I would see a longer video.
Since last update i cant see anymore the majority of my content

developer_response.body: Hi,  Please send us an email: testing@otoy.com.  We would be able to help troubleshoot the issues you might be seeing.

reviews.review_description: Unmatched quality. Hands down the most promising 360 video player!
Great player to experience OTOY' 3D 360 photos. World's best CGI 3D 360 panoramas! Awesone! Interested in VR 3D? Youtube.com/3DVR360

I have to admit, the tech on display here is impressive, it really is. But when it take ages to SEE that tech, and said tech took up 3GB of my phone space AFTER I UNINSTALLED THE APP, I'm inclined to be less forgiving.
For reference, to clear out the space, go to the file manager, select "Phone," and delete the "ORBX" folder. After uninstalling the app, no space-freeing tools detected the hulking 3GB app, and I had to go find it myself.

Takes waaaaaay too long to download 360 images. Its like downloading instructions on how to build a flux capacitor for a time machine. And that's AFTER you already downloaded and install the main "program". Then, it freezes up and hangs. What a waste of time anf effort just to look a handful of some ho-hum pictures.
Absolute the best ..needs only a copple 100.000 picteures more

I really like using this app to play custom scripts displaying my 360 photos and videos. Latest version however seems to mess up the tap detection and disables gamepad input (button 1 -tap).

I created custom lua scripts and tap input now reacts erratic. Sometimes I need to tap and hold before the tap registers. This happens on both the S6 and S7 in both the IE2 and consumer GearVR.

developer_response.body: Hi, Thanks for bring this issue to our attention.  Could you please send us your project files so we could help debug the exact issue. - testing@otoy.com

reviews.review_description:
Please provide more content and the ability to download the files for offline enjoyment.
And keep up your great work!
awesome tech behind this app.
H
